text:
You might also want to include the changes:

=46ixes and Changes:
 =A0 =A0* New: Higher performance
 =A0 =A0* New: Support for local paths in the configuration
 =A0 =A0* New: sendfile() support improved
 =A0 =A0* Fix: Little memory leak in iocache
 =A0 =A0* Fix: Content-Range header
 =A0 =A0* Fix: Time management fixed
 =A0 =A0* Fix: Non-free docs removed
 =A0 =A0* Fix: BSD compilation fix
 =A0 =A0* Fix: A few miscellaneous fixes
